parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_log (event_type, source, payload, timestamp)
VALUES ('FEEDBACK_RECEIVED', 'telegram', '{"score": {{ $('Code — Parse Rating').item.json.score }}, "flagged": {{ $('Code — Parse Rating').item.json.flagged }}}'::jsonb, NOW());

parameters.text: ={{ $('Code — Parse Rating').item.json.flagged ? '⚠️ Noted — score ' + $('Code — Parse Rating').item.json.score + '/5 flagged for review.' : '✅ Thanks! Score ' + $('Code — Parse Rating').item.json.score + '/5 recorded.' }}
